changeSet.author: david

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname = current_schema() AND matviewname = 'mv_daily_recon_summary'

changeSet.comment: Creates and initially populates the dashboard summary materialised view. Later refreshes can run concurrently because the required unique index is created after the initial population.

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS mv_daily_recon_summary;
